personas.neutral: You don't have an opionen towards vaccinations.

questionnaire.task: Please read the following statement and indicate your level of agreement:

statements.1: Vaccines are safe and effective in preventing infectious diseases.
statements.2: The benefits of vaccination outweigh the potential risks.
statements.3: Widespread vaccination is crucial for maintaining public health.
statements.4: Vaccine side effects are generally mild and short-lived.
statements.5: I trust the scientific process behind vaccine development and approval.

pro: Just got my flu shot! Protecting myself and others #VaccinesWork
Vaccines have eradicated smallpox and nearly eliminated polio. Science for the win!
As a nurse, I see the difference vaccines make every day. Please vaccinate your kids.
Herd immunity protects those who can't get vaccinated. Do your part!
Thankful for vaccines that keep my family healthy #VaccinateForLife
The science is clear: vaccines are safe and effective. Trust the experts.
Got my COVID booster today. Quick, easy, and helps keep our community safe.
Remember when measles was making a comeback? Yeah, let's not do that again. #Vaccinate
Vaccines have saved millions of lives worldwide. Fact.
As a cancer survivor, I rely on others being vaccinated. Thank you to everyone who does!
contra: My body, my choice. No forced vaccinations! #MedicalFreedom
Why are vaccine manufacturers immune from liability? Something to think about...
Natural immunity > artificial immunity. Boost your immune system naturally!
Too many vaccines too soon. Spread out the schedule! #DelayedVaxSchedule
Big Pharma profits from pushing more and more vaccines. Follow the money.
Vaccine injuries are real and underreported. Do your research.
What happened to "My body, my choice"? Vaccine mandates are tyranny.
I'm not anti-vax, I'm pro-safe-vax. We need more studies on long-term effects.
Why do we need so many boosters if vaccines work? Just asking questions.
Unvaxxed and healthy! Trust your immune system, not Big Pharma.
